arts.ttl: Antonio Cassano Launches Scathing Attack on Milan Manager Sergio Conceiçao
arts.sum: Former Serie A striker Antonio Cassano has unleashed a blistering critique of AC Milan's current manager Sergio Conceiçao, calling him "just a jester" and "not credible." The outspoken pundit didn't mince words during the latest episode of Viva el Futbol, suggesting that Paulo Fonseca would have been a better choice for the Rossoneri. The post Antonio Cassano Launches Scathing Attack on Milan Manager Sergio Conceiçao appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan Mull Udinese Marksman as a Fallback for Gimenez
arts.sum: Milan will continue to pursue Santiago Gimenez until the final days of the January window, but they have started to weigh some alternatives for the no.9 role, for instance, Lorenzo Lucca, who’s putting together a career season. The post Milan Mull Udinese Marksman as a Fallback for Gimenez appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Dinamo v Milan: Match Preview
arts.sum: AC Milan will travel to Croatia on Wednesday, seeking to secure their place in the UEFA Champions League knockout stages with a victory against Dinamo Zagreb at the Stadion Maksimir. The Rossoneri enter the match with significant momentum, having already accumulated 15 points in the group stage. A win would guarantee their top-eight finish, while Dinamo Zagreb desperately need maximum points to keep their European hopes alive.
